meta.source: tesla semi/v2 chargers_bnetza.json + active Germany rows from chargers_tesla.json
notes: v2 intentionally removes Tesla from BNetzA ingest to avoid duplicates; this dashboard merges the cleaned supercharge.info Tesla records back in as a normal Tesla network.
Tesla rows included here are German OPEN/EXPANDING Supercharger sites, normalized to country DEU.
Provider comparisons should use stall_count where possible; station_count mixes source record semantics.
Full station files remain the source for distance/tile work.
